title: Are the Webinars available after they happen?
excerpt: Because of where I am located, it’s not possible for me to tune-in to the upcoming Agile webinar. Are these recorded and posted online somewhere?

posts.author: Kaharoa (chris)
posts.cookedHtml: Because of where I am located, it’s not possible for me to tune-in to the upcoming Agile webinar. Are these recorded and posted online somewhere?

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Kaharoa

Check out the Monday Webinars page

monday.com

Webinar hub | monday.com

Discover new ways to get started and improve with the monday.com platform

Upcoming live webinars are at the top.

Recorded (On Demand) webinars are lower down the page.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Kaharoa

Yea we post them on the webinar page (soon to be improved to make it much more easy to navigate and find what you’re looking for!)

It takes us around 24h to process the recordings and post them after they happen so please bear with us if you don’t see it there straight away.

Thanks!
